Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for the NorthWind / Pam Kowalski escalation thread using search_emails (query: "NorthWind" or "Pam" or "Kowalski" or similar).
Finds: Pam's direct email to Elena demanding CEO response before Monday (email_id: email_pam_direct_ceo_20260426, ts: 1777219920, Sun Apr 26), Pam's earlier formal final-warning email to David (email_id: email_pam_final_warning_david_20260424, ts: 1777054680, Fri Apr 24), David's exec brief email to Elena with retention package draft (email_id: email_david_elena_northwind_retention_package, ts: 1777164420, Sat Apr 25), Catalina's delayed partial update to Pam acknowledging she is still waiting on confirmations and has not sent the full recovery plan (email_id: email_catalina_draft_northwind_unsent_20260424, ts: 1777078980, Fri Apr 24). Also finds Catalina's Apr 14 recovery-plan promise to Pam in base data (email_id: email_email_ab22f67eeeb0). Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 2: Search emails for Raj Patel incident details using search_emails (query: "Raj Patel" or "chain of custody" or "server lab" or similar).
Finds: Victor Huang's security breach note to Chloe, Chloe's reconstructed timeline, base data about the chain-of-custody breach (equipment loaded before IT escort at 7 AM instead of confirmed 9 AM, placed in warehouse storage despite explicit instructions for direct transport only). Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 3: Search emails for Emilia Cruz piano damage thread using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "piano" or "KeyMove" or similar).
Finds: Craig Nguyen's KeyMove damage report (email from craig.nguyen@keymove-specialty.com to Blessing Okafor with photos of Steinway scratch during second-floor extraction), Emilia Cruz complaint chain. Julian's callback log showing unanswered same-day callback request is primarily in CRM engagements (crm_engagement_0d8a9121b53c) but is referenced contextually in email threads and Pam's escalation. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 4: Search emails for vendor strategy memo thread using search_emails (query: "vendor strategy" or "Marcus" or "Heartland" or "Swift" or similar).
Finds: Marcus's inputs-required email (CC'd to Elena, sent to Chloe, Hana, Alejandro, David) requesting cross-functional data for the Wednesday vendor strategy memo covering the Heartland rate increase tied to the unresolved Q1 dispute and the Swift 15% increase plus $500 DOT documentation surcharge. Also finds Elena's directive email assigning Marcus ownership of the memo. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 5: Search emails for Vectral renewal thread using search_emails (query: "Vectral" or "Rachel Whitfield" or "renewal" or similar).
Finds: Rachel Whitfield's 15% discount demand, Mina's counter-offer at 10% + 12-month extension, Rachel's counter-response at 12%, engagement notes showing renewal pending board decision around April 23. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 6: Search emails for Chloe's capacity concerns using search_emails (query: "capacity" or "coordinator" or "BrightLoop May" or similar).
Finds: Chloe's email to Elena (CC'd David and Mina) stating ops does not have real coordinator capacity left for May, flagging BrightLoop as eight active workstreams, NorthWind still heavy, Canopy adding executive relocation. David's reply supporting Chloe and requesting temp coordinator authorization. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 7: Search Slack #executive (C004) for leadership discussions using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history (channel C004).
Finds: David's retention package post requesting executive guidance on NorthWind (ts: 1777150980.000000, Sat Apr 25) with specific proposal: waive Q2 invoices, dedicated senior coordinator, CEO-signed incident report. Elena's vendor strategy memo directive assigning Marcus (ts: 1777115880.000000, Sat Apr 25). Chloe's capacity warning flagging coordinator overload before BrightLoop May wave (ts: 1777121700.000000, Sat Apr 25). David's earlier NorthWind account-coverage request (ts: 1776355800.000000, Apr 16). Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. QC: Yes (agent must search #executive to find David's retention package details and Chloe's capacity warning; this information is critical for Elena's decisions and a narrow or wrong query would miss it).
OE 8: Search Slack #customer-engagement (C002) for pipeline and competitor intel using conversations_search_messages (query: "NorthWind" or "PathFinder" or "pipeline" or similar, channel C002).
Finds: Alejandro's post flagging $96K Denver expansion pipeline (8 additional relocations) and PathFinder Logistics competitor threat from enterprise accounts with aggressive transition pricing (ts: 1777112400.000000, Sat Apr 25, user: moveops_alejandro_fuentes). Also finds David's NorthWind status request thread to Catalina (ts: 1776724500.000000, Apr 20) and David pressing Catalina on the missed deadline (ts: 1777076400.000000, Fri Apr 24) with Catalina's reply admitting she is still waiting on ops confirmations (ts: 1777076820.000000, Fri Apr 24). Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. QC: Yes (agent must search #customer-engagement to discover the competitor threat and full financial exposure; this information is not in the trigger email or the prompt).
OE 9: Search Slack #finance (C005) for vendor rate impact and margin context using conversations_search_messages (query: "vendor" or "rate" or "NorthWind" or "margin" or similar, channel C005).
Finds: Hana's post connecting NorthWind retention to vendor cost pressure, approximately $47K annualized impact from Heartland and Swift rate increases at current run-rate, warning against broad pricing concessions (ts: 1777114500.000000, Sat Apr 25, user: moveops_hana_kim). Also finds Marcus's earlier vendor cost analysis in base data. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. QC: Yes (agent must search #finance to understand the cost pressure that affects what concessions Elena can offer; the prompt says to understand how vendor rate increases factor into concessions).
OE 10: Look up CRM deals for NorthWind to assess revenue exposure using crm_search_deals (dealname: "NorthWind") or crm_get_deal.
Finds: NorthWind 5 Enterprise Relocations (deal_northwind_won, closedWon, $60K), Denver Satellite Office Expansion (deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2, contractSent, $14,700). Combined existing account value of $74,700 plus the $96K expansion pipeline Alejandro flagged. Read/lookup. Non-default tool. TS: Yes. Skip QC.
OE 11: Look up Airtable records for Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz relocations using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel" or "Emilia Cruz").
Finds: recRajPatelChicagoDenver (In Progress, Chicago to Denver, assigned to Blessing Okafor, special requirements include server lab with hazmat handling and CISO-mandated chain-of-custody), recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver (In Progress, Chicago to Denver, assigned to Blessing Okafor, special requirements include Steinway piano, 27-day lease overlap). Also finds recRajPatelAuditNote0411 noting movers arrived at 7 AM before escort confirmed for 9 AM. Agent needs these operational facts for the corrective action plan in the CEO response. Read/lookup. Non-default tool. TS: Yes. Skip QC.
OE 12: Search Linear for existing NorthWind tracking issues using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind") or linear_get_issue.
Finds: linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 ("NorthWind retention response plan after April escalations", priority 1, assigned to David Chen, due 2026-04-24) with multiple comments including Chloe's ops timeline reconstruction, Alejandro's draft retention concession model, and David's cross-system analysis. Also finds comment_northwind_deadline_missed_20260424 (Catalina, created 2026-04-24 18:07) admitting she did not get a client-ready recovery plan out by the Friday deadline. Read/lookup. Non-default tool. TS: Yes. Skip QC.
OE 13: Send email to Pam Kowalski as CEO using send_email or reply_to_email (to: pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com, from: elena.rostova@moveops.com).
Content: written CEO acknowledgment of Raj Patel chain-of-custody breach and Emilia Cruz piano damage callback failure, commitment to deliver a dated corrective action plan with named owners and timelines, financial goodwill gesture (e.g., invoice waiver or credit), and confirmation of who will personally own the NorthWind relationship going forward. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 14: Send email to David Chen with retention package decisions using send_email (to: david.chen@moveops.com, from: elena.rostova@moveops.com).
Content: Elena's decisions on the three retention package elements David proposed (Q2 invoice waiver for Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz relocations totaling approximately $14,700, dedicated senior coordinator assignment, CEO-signed incident report), and answers to David's two open questions (whether the response comes from Elena directly or David, and how broad the incident report scope should be). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 15: Send email to Marcus Thorne with vendor memo direction using send_email (to: marcus.thorne@moveops.com, from: elena.rostova@moveops.com).
Content: direction on the Heartland dispute settlement and Swift DOT surcharge absorption decision points Marcus raised for the Wednesday vendor strategy memo. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 16: Send email to Chloe Vance with capacity decision using send_email (to: chloe.vance@moveops.com, from: elena.rostova@moveops.com).
Content: decision on coordinator capacity (contractor, hire, or delay) to unblock the BrightLoop May wave and enable the dedicated senior coordinator commitment to NorthWind. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 17: Send email to Mina Hashimoto with Vectral guidance using send_email (to: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, from: elena.rostova@moveops.com).
Content: guidance on whether to follow up with Rachel Whitfield on the Vectral renewal or wait, given the risk of losing two major accounts in the same quarter. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 18: Post consolidated decisions summary in #executive (C004) using conversations_add_message (channel: C004).
Content: summary of all decisions made (NorthWind retention response, vendor memo direction, coordinator capacity, Vectral renewal guidance) so the executive team is aligned before the Monday deadline. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 19: Update CRM deal for NorthWind to reflect retention risk using crm_update_deal_stage (to change deal stage) or crm_create_engagement (to add a note).
Content: update NorthWind deal to reflect the active retention crisis, Monday provider-decision deadline, and PathFinder competitor threat. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 20: Create Linear tracking issue for NorthWind CEO response using linear_create_issue.
Content: tracking ticket for the CEO response to Pam with Monday deadline, linking to the retention package and corrective action plan commitments. Write action. Goes to Outcome.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 17: Send email to Mina Hashimoto with Vectral guidance using send_email (to: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, from: elena.rostova@moveops.com).
Content: guidance on whether to follow up with Rachel Whitfield on the Vectral renewal or wait, given the risk of losing two major accounts in the same quarter. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 18: Post consolidated decisions summary in #executive (C004) using conversations_add_message (channel: C004).
Content: summary of all decisions made (NorthWind retention response, vendor memo direction, coordinator capacity, Vectral renewal guidance) so the executive team is aligned before the Monday deadline. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 19: Update CRM deal for NorthWind to reflect retention risk using crm_update_deal_stage (to change deal stage) or crm_create_engagement (to add a note).
Content: update NorthWind deal to reflect the active retention crisis, Monday provider-decision deadline, and PathFinder competitor threat. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 20: Create Linear tracking issue for NorthWind CEO response using linear_create_issue.
Content: tracking ticket for the CEO response to Pam with Monday deadline, linking to the retention package and corrective action plan commitments. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
